Stories Tagged "Office Legend"

A focused archive path for Office Legend, collecting 4 related Kyunolab records across 3 shelfves.

Modern Legends

The Office Printer That Adds One Blank Witness Page

An office printer that adds one blank page after certain complaint forms are printed.

Modern Legends - 8 min read
Urban Legends

The Office Window That Shows Lights After Everyone Leaves

A dark office building where one window appears lit in stories told by cleaners and late commuters.

Urban Legends - 9 min read
Strange Places

The Stairwell Between Two Floors: A Strange Place Story About Doors That Should Line Up

A staircase in an ordinary building seems to end between floors, where the landing is too clean and the door number does not belong.

Strange Places - 9 min read
Modern Legends

The Night-Shift Guard and the Third Floor: A Workplace Legend That Keeps Returning

A silent third floor, an elevator that opens alone, and a guard who learns which stories not to mock.

Modern Legends - 8 min read
